packageId.description: Stable Attune package id, for example attune-nx.

sourceRoot.description: Package root recorded in the generated contract, for example packages/attune-nx.

directory.description: Source directory where attune.package.ts files should be written. Defaults to <sourceRoot>/src when sourceRoot is provided, otherwise src.

project.description: Owning Nx project id for generated provenance.

operationId.description: Optional seed operation id. Defaults to <packageId>-boundary.

operationName.description: Optional human-readable operation name used for generated schema identifiers.

generatorVersion.description: Generator version recorded in Source BOM provenance.

generatorRevision.description: Generator revision recorded in Source BOM provenance.

openspecChangeId.description: OpenSpec change id recorded in Source BOM provenance.
